lastReleaseMessage: v0.58.43 - world scaled to native 256px art (TILE_W 106, 1x render); GDD Architecture tab + ARCHITECTURE.md re-woven to current code; Lantern footprint single-sourced to 4x4; playability + release-descriptive preship gates

barRaise.topFinding: Frozen week. HEAD never moved off v0.58.42 (last commit 2026-06-19); no commit landed on 06-20 or 06-21, so the release motion the 06-20 report celebrated has reverted to a full stop. The durable release.ps1 gate (br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate-2026-06-18) is on its seventh audit unbuilt, M1 has held at 40% since 2026-06-10 (eleven days) with no mechanics commit, and the ASSETS.md regen the 06-20 drift-fix applied is still uncommitted a second consecutive day, so a git checkout would lose it. The 06-20 observability action (re-run write-dashboard-status) was not done either, so Rising.json still reports workTreeClean true against a dirty tree and a null audit block. Nothing is new; the same recurring set is one cycle older because the structural fix that closes it at the root keeps getting deferred. Land the gate, commit the stranded regen, then spend a session on an actual M1 row.

actions.title: Land br-release-footer-and-automsg-gate-2026-06-18 (two release.ps1 preship guards); seventh audit running, the single durable closer for the manifest, footer, and bare-message classes.
Commit the docs/ASSETS.md regen and add the untracked assets/art/terrain/BR256Grass_tile512.png.import sidecar on the next release; stranded two consecutive days.
Make the next focused session an M1 mechanics row (Hold the Wall mission script or save/load); M1 frozen at 40% for eleven days, zero releases this cycle.
Backfill GDD footer entries v0.58.14 through v0.58.42. Queued as br-gdd-footer-v05814-v05840-2026-06-18 (range extends to v0.58.42).
Rewrite the bare CHANGELOG entries v0.58.25-v0.58.42 to describe their work. Queued as br-changelog-bare-automsg-v05825-v05840-2026-06-18.
Re-run write-dashboard-status (corrects workTreeClean and workQueueDepth) and wire the canonical-audit skill to populate the Rising.json audit block; 06-20 instance was not done.
git rm --cached scripts/*.ps1.bak (tenth review) and correct the building.gd header version refs (v0.67.0 / v0.61.14 against a v0.58.42 repo).
Flip br-assets-manifest-regen-2026-06-18 off committed-ready (file uncommitted) and extend the two -v05840 row ranges to v0.58.42; no duplicate -v05842 rows exist.
